positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at dusk. The composition is centralized, featuring glowing, interconnected flora and fauna (fireflies, fox silhouettes, stylized mushrooms) against a deep indigo and sapphire blue gradient. The style should be highly contrasting linework combined with watercolor washes, giving a magical, ethereal feel. Use strong, clean silhouettes against a subtle background gradient. Limited color palette focusing on glowing cyan, gold, deep purple, and emerald green. Perfect for repeating apparel print, vector quality, centered design, high detail, negative space.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, cartoon, sketch, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, grainy, dirty
